function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I found the canonical project record for Toy Forge Saturdays, but I could not find a canonical project for “basement renovation” to compare against, so I cannot determine which started first or delete one without guessing. Please provide the exact basement-renovation project folder/path in `40_projects/`.

function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION because the request depends on a second canonical project ('basement renovation') that is not identifiable from available project records; task cannot be completed without guessing which project to compare/delete.
